examples: Vicuna, a small town in the north of Chile, is a great place for watching stars all year round.
In Vicuna, distant star systems such as Magellanic Clouds can be seen without the help of an instrument.
In fact, the sky is so clear in Vicuna that it is possible to see many stars that can be seen only with advanced instruments in other parts of the world.
The fabric of the single-breasted suit was sourced from vicuna and qiviuk, two of the most expensive sources of wool in the world.
